response.overview: "I made this movie when I was 15. A parody of David and Golith. Shot off a JVC VHS-C. Shot on the weekends at Nick's house this movie took three months to complete. We wrote the story from scene to scene. We didn't have any way to edit so we had so just change the sets. All shot on one tape. VHS can get you there. This was a break threw movie for me. I realized that I was capable of making somthing amazing with almost nothing but time and a video camera. The Billy&Brono show... 1443 frames.  Voices by Larry Mclaren, Nick Casta, Gabe Galvin, Liz Galvin, and Jared Whitham"
response.title: The Billy and Brono Show
